More from the KALLAX series

KALLAX Shelving unit, white, 77x77 cm

$69Price $ 69
Price incl. GST
KALLAX underframe 76x39x18 cm is sold separately.

Design it yourself

Customise KALLAX by using our planner tool

How to get it

Available services

WARNING! TIPPING HAZARD

Children have died from furniture tipping over. ALWAYS anchor your furniture to the wall with an anti-tip device. NEVER place a TV on any furniture other than a media/TV bench intended for this purpose. ALWAYS secure your TV by using an anchoring device. NEVER allow children to stand, climb, or hang on drawers, doors or shelves. NEVER open more than one drawer at the time. ALWAYS place heaviest items in the lowest drawers.

Hang it on the wall or stand it on the floor – the KALLAX series adapts to taste, space and budget. Personalise the shelving unit with inserts and boxes to make it suit your needs.

Article Number006.167.67

Product details

The simple design with clean lines makes KALLAX flexible and easy to use at home. ​

Choose whether you want to hang it on the wall or stand it on the floor.

​Personalise your shelving unit with boxes and inserts, or add an underframe for an airy look.

Designer

Tord Björklund

Article Number006.167.67

Good to know

This furniture can take a max load of 25 kg on the top.

The max load for a wall-hung frame depends on the wall material.

Two persons are needed for the assembly of this furniture.

May be completed with KALLAX insert, sold separately.

Coordinates well with pieces of furniture in the LACK series that have the same timeless expression and material as KALLAX.

Complete with KALLAX underframe to give this shelving unit a new look while making it easier to vacuum under the unit.

KALLAX underframe 76x39x18 cm is sold separately.

Materials and care

Material

Particleboard, Fibreboard, Paper foil, Honeycomb structure paper filling (100% recycled), Plastic edging

Care

Wipe clean with a cloth dampened in a mild cleaner.

Wipe dry with a clean cloth.

Safety and compliance

WARNING! Tipping hazard – this product must be securely anchored. Use suitable screws and plugs for your home. If you are uncertain, seek professional advice.WARNING! Falling hazard – to reduce the risk of this product falling down, it must be securely anchored. Use suitable screws and plugs for your home. If you are uncertain, seek professional advice.

Assembly and documents

Assembly instructions

KALLAX Shelving unit006.167.67

Measurements

  • Width: 76.5 cm
  • Depth: 39 cm
  • Height: 76.5 cm
  • Max. load/shelf: 13 kg
  • Max. load/wall cabinet: 20 kg

Skip customer reviews
Review: 5 out of 5 stars.5
Perfect size for our space
It was easy to put together. The depth is a good size for storing larger items.
Ann, Canada
Review: 5 out of 5 stars.5
Great shelving unit
This was perfect for what we need to organize our office. We ended up using 4 which were very easy to assemble. We did purchase feet which we painted and attached to the bottom so each looks like a finished piece of furniture.
Marcia, United States
Review: 5 out of 5 stars.5
Shelf Unit by Kallax
Happy with my purchase. Easy to assemble. Very sturdy and holding up beautifully in a classroom. Would buy again
Louise, United States
